hero.quote: "Dayatara is a growing space for Nusantara's creative energy — connecting ideas, people, and potential to create meaningful change."

beranda.p1: Driven by the spirit of keeping culture alive and beneficial for society, Yayasan Daya Cipta Nusantara (DAYATARA) exists as a collaboration space connecting culture, creativity, and community in one shared movement.
beranda.p2Tail: , DAYATARA drives the growth of Nusantara's arts & culture, strengthens local communities, opens creative space for the younger generation, and supports SMEs and the creative economy.
beranda.p3: For DAYATARA, culture is not only a heritage to protect, but also a force that unites society and drives Nusantara's future.

pillars.title: Nusantara Arts & Culture
pillars.desc: Development of traditional arts & culture — wayang, dance, music, and theatre.

pillars.title: SMEs & Creative Economy
pillars.desc: Empowering culture-based SMEs to grow and compete.

pillars.title: Youth Creativity
pillars.desc: Opening space for the younger generation to create, collaborate, and make an impact.

pillarSection.whatsappMessage: Hello Dayatara, I'm interested in collaborating on the {{title}} program.

seni.title: Nusantara Arts & Culture
body: A development program for traditional arts and culture — from wayang, dance, and traditional music to theatre — with an approach that connects heritage with life today.
We facilitate performance curation, creative production, and creative space for artists across generations throughout Nusantara.

umkm.title: SMEs & Creative Economy
body: Empowering culture-based SMEs through mentoring, training, product development, and market access.
Building a sustainable, fair creative economy ecosystem rooted in local wisdom.

muda.title: Youth Creativity
body: Opening space for the younger generation to create, collaborate, and find their voice through the language of culture.
Workshops, residencies, and cross-disciplinary mentoring programs — from arts and media to creative entrepreneurship.

articles.title: Cross-Generation Collaborative Wayang Night in Yogyakarta
articles.body:
This wayang kulit performance brought a senior dalang together with young artists on one stage, blending classic tales with contemporary interpretation. The event is part of Dayatara's Arts & Culture program aimed at nurturing the next generation of traditional artists.

Held in Yogyakarta, the evening drew local arts communities, academics, and members of the public eager to witness this cross-generational dialogue through the art of wayang.

articles.title: Nusantara Batik Exhibition Reaches Southeast Asian Markets
articles.body:
The exhibition showcased dozens of batik works from artisans mentored by Dayatara, ranging from classic motifs to contemporary explorations. Through curation and hands-on support, these products successfully reached distribution networks in several Southeast Asian countries.

The program is part of Dayatara's SMEs & Creative Economy pillar, which focuses on strengthening production capacity and market access for culture-based businesses.

articles.title: Youth Creative Workshop: Weaving Nusantara's Stories
articles.body:
The workshop invited young participants to reimagine Nusantara folk stories through creative approaches — from illustration and scriptwriting to digital content production. Participants were guided by mentors from the arts and media community.

The activity is a concrete expression of Dayatara's Youth Creativity pillar, opening space for young people to create while keeping Nusantara's storytelling heritage relevant for future generations.
